sections.entity:
<Entity id="eaa642b1-0e7e-4137-8183-1523eb99b26d" patternsProximity="300" recommendedConfidence="85" relaxProximity="false">
<Pattern confidenceLevel="85">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_community_corrections_order_corrections_order_terms_community-corrections-order" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_community_corrections_order_primary_keywords_community-corrections-order" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_community_corrections_order_classification_markers_community-corrections-order" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_community_corrections_order_corroborative_terms_community-corrections-order" />
<Match idRef="Pattern_community_corrections_order_corrective_services_act_community-corrections-order" />
<Match idRef="Pattern_community_corrections_order_corrections_reference_community-corrections-order" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_community_corrections_order_exclusion_community-corrections-order" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
<Pattern confidenceLevel="75">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_community_corrections_order_corrections_order_terms_community-corrections-order" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_community_corrections_order_primary_keywords_community-corrections-order" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_community_corrections_order_exclusion_community-corrections-order" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
<Pattern confidenceLevel="65">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_community_corrections_order_corrections_order_terms_community-corrections-order" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_community_corrections_order_exclusion_community-corrections-order" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
</Entity>

resources:
<Resource idRef="eaa642b1-0e7e-4137-8183-1523eb99b26d">
<Name default="true" langcode="en-us">TestPattern - Community Corrections Order</Name>
<Description default="true" langcode="en-us">Detects community-based corrections orders including probation orders, parole conditions, and community service orders issued under the Corrective Services Act 2006 (Qld). These documents contain offender details, supervision conditions, approved addresses, and compliance assessments by Queensland Corrective Services.</Description>
</Resource>
